channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Iran halting indirect talks with US over Israel's Lebanon incursion, Tasnim says
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Iran warns it could suspend talks if Israeli attacks continue in Lebanon
- Iran warns Israeli attacks in Lebanon and Gaza threaten US ceasefire talks
- Iran suspends talks with the US over Israel’s strikes on Lebanon
- Iran warns Israeli attacks in Lebanon and Gaza threaten US ceasefire talks
- Watch: Iran suspends talks as Israel widens Lebanon offensive | Above the Fold | 01.06.2026
- Iran suspends talks with U.S. over Israel’s Lebanon strikes
- Iran warns Israeli attacks in Lebanon threaten ceasefire with US
- Iran freezes talks with US over Israeli military action in Lebanon, IRGC-affiliated outlet claims
- Iran suspends US talks over Israel’s Lebanon escalation, state media reports: What to know
- Iran Halts Talks With US Over Israeli Escalation in Lebanon]]>

item.description:

- IRGC says it struck airbase used in US attack on southern Iran
- U.S. says it struck Iranian military sites, Tehran responds with air base attack
- IRGC Retaliates Against Base From Which US Attacked Iranian Island - Reports]]>

item.title: Trump says talks with Iran continue; Israel, Hezbollah agree to halt fire
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Trump Claims Iran Talks Continuing ‘At Rapid Pace’ Despite Tehran Suspending Negotiations Over Israel’s Lebanon Campaign
- Trump Says Israel and Hezbollah Will Hold Off on New Military Action
- Trump Says Israel and Hezbollah Will Hold Off on New Military Action
- Trump Says Israel, Hezbollah Agree To Halt Fighting
- Trump speaks to Netanyahu as Hezbollah claims to be ready for full ceasefire
- Trump says Israel, Hezbollah to halt attacks
- ‘Had a call with Bibi, all shooting will stop’: Trump says Israel, Hezbollah agree to halt fighting
- Trump says Iran talks continue 'at rapid pace' as Tehran suspends negotiations after Lebanon strikes
- Trump says agrees with Israel, Hezbollah on ceasefire terms in Lebanon
- Trump Says Israel and Hezbollah Will Stop Fighting, Iran Talks Still Ongoing
- Trump says Israel and Hezbollah agreed to halt attacks
- Trump says Israel, Hezbollah agree to halt fighting
- Trump says Hezbollah, Israel agree to stop fighting after call with Netanyahu
- Trump says talks with Iran continue]]>
